% Script generated by Brainstorm (17-Mar-2026)

% Input files
sFiles = {...
    'Subject02/Positive/timefreq_morlet_260413_1550_db.mat', ...
    'Subject01/Positive/timefreq_morlet_260413_1549_db.mat'};
sFiles2 = {...
    'Subject01/Neutral/timefreq_morlet_260413_1547_db.mat', ...
    'Subject02/Neutral/timefreq_morlet_260413_1449_db.mat'};

% Start a new report
bst_report('Start', sFiles);

% Process: Perm t-test paired [-200ms,800ms 2-55Hz Oz, O1, O2, Pz, P3, P4, F3, F4, FCz, FC1 ]          H0:(A=B), H1:(A<>B)
sFiles = bst_process('CallProcess', 'process_test_permutation2p', sFiles, sFiles2, ...
    'timewindow',     [-0.2, 0.8], ...
    'freqrange',      [2, 55], ...
    'rows',           'Oz, O1, O2, Pz, P3, P4, F3, F4, FCz, FC1 ', ...
    'isabs',          0, ...
    'avgtime',        0, ...
    'avgrow',         1, ...
    'avgfreq',        0, ...
    'matchrows',      1, ...
    'iszerobad',      1, ...
    'Comment',        '', ...
    'test_type',      'ttest_paired', ...  % Paired Student's t-test T = mean(A-B) / std(A-B) * sqrt(n)
    'randomizations', 5000, ...
    'tail',           'two');  % Two-tailed

% Save and display report
ReportFile = bst_report('Save', sFiles);
bst_report('Open', ReportFile);
% bst_report('Export', ReportFile, ExportDir);
% bst_report('Email', ReportFile, username, to, subject, isFullReport);

% Delete temporary files
% gui_brainstorm('EmptyTempFolder');
